Class OMByteArray

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.core.mathematics.loaders.openmath.OMObject
org.jscience.core.mathematics.loaders.openmath.OMByteArray
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class OMByteArray extends OMObject
Models an OpenMath byte array.

Version:
$Revision: 1.3 $
Author:
Manfred N. Riem (mriem@manorrock.org)
See Also:
  • "The OpenMath standard 2.0, 2.1.1"

      public boolean isAtom()

      public boolean isComposite()

      isComposite in class OMObject
      Returns:
      false because we are not composite.
